texts.title: Royal blessing — ꜥnḫ wḏꜣ snb (Post 6)
texts.source: Formula ubiquitous in New Kingdom stelae; transliteration per Gardiner/James P. Allen, Middle Egyptian (2010); https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Egyptian_language (CC BY-SA 3.0)
texts.pronunciation_confidence: moderate — vowels not written in hieroglyphs

line_ipa_derivation.method: lesson IPA per content_concepts_v1; Egyptological convention, not in brain scrape
line_ipa_derivation.citation: Allen, Middle Egyptian (2010); Wikipedia: Egyptian language (CC BY-SA 3.0)

texts.notes: DAVID Post 6 hook line. Hieroglyphic attestation secure; Egyptological vowel insertions are reconstructed.
